---
title: "Use AI to build and share insights from health data"
---

![](images/rmedicine-webinar-garrett-grolemund-main-image.png){width=80%}

### [Register here!](https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_SNF_TsPJQhSEaDeMqKJFHA)

## Date and time

**June 11, 2026, 12pm–3pm ET**

## Summary

This short workshop will show you how to enhance your productivity with AI. We will use the free Positron IDE and its integrated AI agents to build and share:

1. Reports with Quarto
2. Dashboards with Quarto
3. Interactive apps with Shiny
4. AI powered apps with QueryChat

We will learn how to share these on Posit Connect, where you can control access to your content, schedule automatic updates, monitor usage, and more.

Together, these activities help demonstrate the benefit of using AI not simply to find _answers_, but to build auditable and reproducible _code trails_ that generate answers.***

### [Register now!](https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_SNF_TsPJQhSEaDeMqKJFHA)

## Speaker

![](images/garrett-grolemund.jpg){width=40%}

### Garrett Grolemund

Garrett Grolemund is the Co-Author of R for Data Science, the creator of the Lubridate R package, and an ASA award-winning educator. For over a decade, he has helped data scientists learn to analyze data with R's Tidyverse and build interactive apps with R's Shiny framework.
